Name: SHIVALAYA CONSTRUCTION LIMITED
Description:
SHIVALAYA CONSTRUCTION LIMITED is a construction company based out of Delhi, India. Established in 1997 by its visionary directors. Shivalaya is considered among the elite construction and engineering companies in the country. 

Our vision is to be a leading construction & engineering company by setting the highest standards in client satisfaction & quality of construction. To deliver high-quality, cost-effective projects on schedule by employing and supporting passionate, flexible, and focused project teams. We value the importance of our relations and will continue to provide & efficient solution to our client.

We have implemented projects for several government departments like PWD of Haryana, Maharashtra, Jharkhand, Himachal Pradesh, Rajasthan, Delhi, Madhya Pradesh, Chhattisgarh & whole of North East - Manipur, Nagaland, Arunachal Pradesh & Mizoram as well as for NHAI, NHIDCL, NBCC, HSCC.

Currently, the company is involved in multi-billion Indian Rupee infrastructure development projects like National, State Highways and Bridges, Government buildings, etc. across India. We are known to successfully complete infrastructure projects well within deadlines. As a testament to this fact, we have been rewarded with bonus for early completion of multiple projects.

As a result of the dedication and passion of the directors and associates of the company, combined with the purpose of helping build a better nation, Shivalaya Construction Co. Pvt. Ltd. has graduated from being a small civil contractor to one of the major players in various states. The revenue of the company has increased manifold in past few years.

We credit this success to our experienced and well qualified team of civil engineers and administration personnel who assist our directors in impeccable execution of the tasks undertaken by the company. We trust our team to help our company stay aligned and qualified to our purpose, which is to help build a better India.

Name: Concesionaria Vía Sumapaz
Description:
En VÍA SUMAPAZ ponemos la Movilidad Positiva en acción.

Somos la Concesión a cargo de la modernización, operación y el mantenimiento de la vía Bogotá-Girardot, y parte de la red global de soluciones de movilidad VINCI Highways, filial de VINCI Concessions, líder en concesiones viales y servicios de movilidad en 14 países.

Nos respalda la experiencia de VINCI Highways para ofrecer los más altos estándares de rendimiento y seguridad. 

Nuestro objetivo es brindar a los conductores una experiencia positiva en la carretera, al mismo tiempo que contribuimos a conectar a más de 17 millones de colombianos.

Trabajamos en sinergia en pro del planeta, las personas, su seguridad, la prosperidad y la innovación a lo largo de los 145 kilómetros de nuestra vía. 

Nuestra labor abarca los departamentos de Cundinamarca y Tolima, así como los 13 municipios que conforman nuestra área de influencia.

Para obtener más información, visita nuestro sitio web en www.viasumapaz.com.

Name: SIRAT SA
Description:
La Société des Infrastructures Routières et de l’Aménagement du Territoire (SIRAT SA), est une entreprise au service de l’intérêt public. Elle intervient en tant que Maitre d’ouvrage délégué des organismes publics pour tous types de projets relatifs à l’aménagement du territoire (routes, bâtiments et infrastructures diverses). Elle est ainsi un centre d’expertises pour l’initiation, la conception, le suivi et la gestion des grands projets de développement du Benin.
La SIRAT est également chargée de la gestion des postes de péages et pesages, ainsi que de la mise en œuvre de l’entretien du réseau routier.

Name: Chartered Institution of Highways & Transportation (CIHT)
Description:
The Chartered Institution of Highways and Transportation (CIHT) is a charity, learned society, and membership body with 12 UK regions and several international groups. CIHT serves highway and transportation professionals as a professional membership and registration body in the UK and internationally, offering benefits to members that include e-learning, a bimonthly magazine, a professional network, policy and technical updates, in-person and online events, registration, and qualification opportunities.

CIHT represents and qualifies professionals who plan, design, build, manage and operate transport and infrastructure.

We offer routes to qualifications including Chartered Engineer, Incorporated Engineer and Engineering Technician, the SoRSA Certificate of Competency and Transport Planning Professional.

CIHT is the leading voice of the highways and transportation infrastructure profession. We are the prime source of advice for national and local government and other national and local government and other strategic stakeholders when they are seeking technical expertise and knowledge to guide future policy and investment.

The Institution is the natural home for all people working in transport infrastructure who are seeking education, professional qualifications, technical guidance and networking in a welcoming environment.

Name: ICA Yavuz Sultan Selim Köprüsü ve Kuzey Çevre Otoyolu İşletmesi
Description:

Sektörünün öncü şirketi olarak özel otoyol işletmeciliği kültürünün ülkemizde oluşmasını ve iyi uygulamalar ile dünya çapında saygın bir yer edinmesini sağlamak başlıca hedefleridir.

ICA Investment and Management Inc., is responsible from all maintenance and operational works of Yavuz Sultan Selim Bridge and Northern Ring Motorway, and manages all commercial activities on the Northern Motorway.
As the leading company of this sector, the main goal of ICA is to establish private motorway culture in Turkey and ensuring that, with best practices, Turkish Private Motorway Management Sector, gain a respectable place in the world.

Name: Esnad Contracting
Description:
تأسـست شـركة إسـناد الطرق سـنة 1999م  بهـدف تدعيـــم قطـــاع هندســـة الطـــرق والجسور برؤيـــة مختلفـــة تطمـــح إلى الاستحواذ على نســـبة كبيـــرة مـــن ســـوق الإنشـــاءات المتعلقـــة بهندســـة الطـــرق والجسور والأعمـــال ذات الصلـــة. 
وفي خلال 3 سنوات احتلـــت شـــركة إســـناد الطرق مـــكاناً متميـــزاً وســـط 
كبـري الشـركات العاملـة فـي نفـس المجـال مــن خلال اســتقطاب الكفــاءات المتخصصــة 
وتوفيـــر القـــدرات الفنيـــة والتقنيـــة وأفضـــل المـــواد الخـــام وأحـــدث المعـــدات التـــي 
تسـاهم فـي تحقيـق رؤيـة الشـركة وتواكب رؤيـــة المملكـــة العربيـــة الســـعوية 2030.

Name: Lima Expresa
Description:
Lima Expresa, a subsidiary of VINCI Highways, is the operator of 16 kilometers of the Vía de Evitamiento, from the Javier Prado clover to the Habich oval, and 9 kilometers of Vía Expresa Línea Amarilla, located between the Huáscar Bridge and the border with the province of Callao on Avenida Morales Duárez. 

Lima Expresa is time saving: Using the Vía de Evitamiento and the Yellow Line express route it is possible to save around 20 minutes from the Javier Prado clover to the airport, compared to other existing routes. (Source: Google Maps | 2023 | Average time – Peak hour tomorrow).

Lima Expresa is security. From 2016 to 2023 we have reduced the serious accident rate by 72%.

Lima Expresa offers roads in excellent condition: We guarantee first-class maintenance on 25 km of roads and we collect around 20 tons of solid waste, clearing and brush daily.

Lima Expresa is attention to our clients: 24/7 surveillance with more than 120 cameras and Argos, our Monitoring Operations Control Center, our clients have an immediate response to road emergencies.

Committed to achieving the high standards of VINCI Highways in Peru, Lima Expresa became the first highway concession in the country to implement a fleet of electric vehicles, solar panels and protect Amazon forests. Lima Expresa has already reduced its direct CO2 emissions (scope 1 and 2) by 44% since 2018.

Name: Concesión Autopista del Río Grande
Description:

Este proyecto, que espera generar más de 42.000 empleos entre directos e indirectos, se encuentra en la fase de preconsutrucción tras firmar el acta de inicio en diciembre de 2022 

Longitud: 272.1 Km 
Departamentos: Santander, Norte de Santander y Cesar. 
Pre-Construcción: 12 Meses (Elaboración de EYD Fase III, Financiación, Gestión Predial y Social, Estudios Ambientales y Licenciamientos, OyM Infraestructura Existente)
Construcción: 47 meses (Construcción, Mejoramiento y segunda puesta a punto)
Operación y Mantenimiento Vía Existente: 25 Años

clientes, colaboradores, acionistas e investidores, a Engevia tem como um dos seus principais objectivos, manter a empresa aderente às leis e às suas normas e procedimentos, e estabelecer uma conduta íntegra em todas as suas esferas de actuação, tornando-se destaque no mercado com um diferencial competitivo.

Nossa sede em Luanda está vocacionada integralmente para a operacionalidade e gestão de suporte das actividades desenvolvidas nas províncias.
Construída numa área de aproximadamente 30.000 m2, conta com edifícios administrativos, refeitório com cozinha industrial, oficinas, laboratório de controlo tecnológico, armazém de peças e materiais diversos e ambulatório.

Name: COLAS Australia Group
Description:
COLAS Australia Group was formed in 2008 through the acquisitions of local companies and has continued to expand throughout Australia since then through organic growth and further acquisitions. Today, our decentralised network of local companies allows us to provide our products and services anywhere in Australia.  Our operations consists of three core activities Bitumen imports and sales, Manufacturing and sales of Binders and Emulsions and Road Maintenance work. Supported by over 400 employees, 26 work sites in 4 states all working closely with customers to provide more options and better solutions by developing and improving products and construction services based on recycling of materials, improving of energy efficiency and reducing greenhouse gas emissions.

COLAS Australia Group, a subsidiary of the COLAS Group provides us with access to a world leader in the construction and maintenance of transport infrastructure. With 55,000 employees in more than 50 countries on five continents, the COLAS Group works in every business segment involving the construction and maintenance of roads, along with other types of transport infrastructure as well as urban development, through two operating units: Roads, our core business, and Specialized Activities to expand the range of offers. Through our projects and our innovations, Colas aims to meet the modern world’s real needs for mobility, urban development and environmental protection.

Corporate Sustainability
COLAS Australia has always taken sustainability and our role in the communities we work, very seriously. For us, sustainability is about taking decisions that recognise the interests and concerns of everyone. It’s about listening to customers, clients, employees and stakeholders then balancing their needs with those of our business. At COLAS we’re all working hard to ensure we have a robust, intelligent and collaborative approach to sustainable development.

Name: Via Brasil Concessões
Description:
A Via Brasil Concessionária de Rodovias S.A. é uma empresa constituída para atuar como operadora de serviços públicos concessionados na área de infraestrutura de transportes. É a responsável pela administração dos trechos concessionados pelo Governo de Mato Grosso das rodovias estaduais MT-100, MT-320/208 e MT-246.

A concessão da MT-100, em operação comercial desde dezembro de 2019, perfaz trajeto de 91,4 km do entroncamento com a BR-364, na altura do município de Alto Araguaia (MT), passando por Alto Taquari (MT), até a divisa com Mato Grosso do Sul. O caminho pela rodovia MT-100, paralelo à FerroNorte, apresenta a menor distância entre as regiões Norte/Centro-Oeste e Sudeste e constitui importante eixo de transporte e escoamento da produção agropecuária.

A concessão das rodovias MT-320 (159 km) e MT-208 (29 km) contempla 188 km. O trecho é fundamental para ligar municípios das regiões Noroeste e Norte de Mato Grosso com a BR-163. Cinco cidades (Alta Floresta, Carlinda, Nova Canaã do Norte, Colíder e Nova Santa Helena) e 112 mil moradores são atendidos diretamente pela concessão da Via Brasil, que colabora efetivamente para a atração de novos investimentos e desenvolvimento regional. 

O modelo de concessão da MT-246 compreende os 233,2 km entre Jangada (MT) e a divisa com Campo Novo do Parecis (MT), que abrange trechos das rodovias estaduais MT-246, MT-343, MT-358 e MT-480. A rota possui alta demanda do agronegócio por alimentar os dois caminhos mais importantes da região para o escoamento de produção agrícola direcionada aos portos de Santos (SP) e Miritituba (PA).

A Via Brasil opera com sistema de gestão baseado nas melhores práticas do mercado e adota valores que contribuem para o desenvolvimento socioeconômico das regiões em que atua por meio da viabilização de investimentos e oferecimento de serviços de excelência. Via Brasil, esse é o caminho!

Name: IndianOil Total Pvt. Ltd.

Our product range includes Bitumen derivatives such as Bitumen Emulsions, Polymer Modified Bitumen (PMB), Crumbed Rubber Modified Bitumen (CRMB) etc.

Description:
At Connect Highways, we are dedicated to providing the best possible service and customer satisfaction. 



Established in 2021, we bring over 30 years of industry experience to the table. Our experienced management team is focused on putting the client first and providing efficient, reliable, and effective traffic management solutions. Our goal is to ensure the safe and smooth flow of traffic, while also maintaining the highest level of service.



We understand that traffic management is not just about controlling traffic, but also about ensuring the safety of road users and workers alike. That's why we have implemented robust health and safety measures to ensure that our operations are conducted in a safe and responsible manner. Our fleet of vehicles and equipment are always up-to-date and maintained to the highest standards, allowing us to provide the best possible service to our clients.



In addition to our commitment to customer satisfaction and safe operations, we are also dedicated to reducing our carbon footprint. Our goal is to become carbon neutral by 2028, and we are actively working towards this by implementing sustainable practices and reducing our energy consumption.

Our focus on quality service, attention to detail, and commitment to customer satisfaction and sustainability makes us a leading choice for traffic management services. 



Whether you are looking for temporary traffic management solutions or permanent traffic management systems, we are here to help. Contact us today to find out more about our services and how we can help with your traffic management needs.

This is a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) promoted for the development of a 132-kilometre four-lane, the highway from Chainage 0+000 to Chainage 131+500. 
This highway stretch has 2 Toll Plazas, one in Tapi District (Mandal Chainage - 54.100Km length) and the second in Surat District (Bhatia Chainage- 77.400Km length), located in Gujarat. 
This highway stretch is located in the western part of India in the state of Gujarat that passes touches the city of Surat. Surat is known to be the world's largest diamond manufacturing centre, home to over 5,000 diamond manufacturing units including the most advanced, large-scale diamond-cutting factories in the world.

Description:

Infrastructure is composed of public and private physical structures such as roads, railways, bridges, tunnels, water supply, sewers, electrical grids, and telecommunications (including Internet connectivity and broadband access). In general, infrastructure has been defined as "the physical components of interrelated systems providing commodities and services essential to enable, sustain, or enhance societal living conditions" and maintain the surrounding environment.

Name: Performance Equipment Service
Description:
We specialize in all of your asphalt milling and planning needs. We possess the experience and technology capable of cutting asphalt to grade, maximizing your material cost. We can complete any project, from parking lot patches to major highways, automotive tire test tracks and airport runways.  We strive to provide a quality product with minimal clean up and maximum production. We are proud to use Wirtgen Cold Plaining machines in our fleet. Our machines are very well maintained which resonates into very few breakdowns and lost time.

All of our milled materials will go back into an asphalt plant or will be re-utilized in the road building process.

Lime is our primary means of stabilizing soils with high clay content, in order to repair sub grades for Parking lots, Roadways, or Building Pads.  Cement and Liquid Asphalt Emulsion Injection are all an Eco-friendly way of stabilizing and recycling existing roadways, and extremely worn surfaces.  We bid and complete projects, LARGE and Small, and push for a fast turnout in our stabilization. From a couple hundred square yards to 100+ acres. We have the capacity to stabilize projects upwards of 250 tons a day.  Our crews are versed in the measurement for application and the testing requirements of DOT and other agencies.

Name: Adoquínes y bloques puente negro
Description:
Adoquines y Bloques Puente Negro comenzó como el proyecto de una familia comprometida con mejorar los espacios, como calles y patios, para brindar mayor facilidad de acceso a las personas en sus hogares y lugares de trabajo. Siempre nos hemos enfocado en nuestros clientes y su satisfacción.

Desde el 2001, este proyecto se hizo realidad con la fabricación de bloques. Con el tiempo, seguimos innovando y detectamos una dificultad para el acceso a ciertas localidades. Buscando una solución, incorporamos a nuestro catálogo el adoquín hexagonal. Después de muchas pruebas, logramos la mezcla ideal para garantizar su durabilidad y estética.

Más adelante, no solo nos dedicamos a la venta de adoquines, sino que también incursionamos en el sector de instalación. Para ello, sumamos a nuestro equipo personal altamente capacitado y con gran experiencia.

Entre nuestros productos principales destacan el adoquín rectangular (o jaboncillo) y el adoquín cuadrado. Estos dos tipos de adoquines permiten crear diseños únicos y espectaculares. Los integramos a nuestro catálogo porque, tras probar la instalación del adoquín hexagonal en patios, vimos que no era la opción más adecuada. En nuestra búsqueda de una mejor solución, encontramos que estos dos tipos de adoquines eran ideales para patios y otros espacios.

Con el tiempo, también incorporamos todo tipo de bermas prefabricadas, ampliando aún más nuestra oferta para satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes.
Siempre comprometidos con la calidad e innovación para transformar tus espacios y tu felicidad.

Name: O-Dowel
Description:
The O-Dowel bar is a carbon steel tubular dowel bar that's improving highway construction, from new jointed pavement concrete construction to full-depth repairs. Due to its hollow construction, it is lighter, safer and more durable than conventional solid steel dowel bars. The O-Dowel tubular dowel bar means faster installations, fewer safety risks and better freight efficiencies.

O-Dowel is committed to a brighter and more sustainable future, which is why O-Dowel is made from 100% recycled steel and is recyclable after the road's useful life. And because of the lightweight design, fewer truckloads are needed to ship the O-Dowel. That means a lower carbon footprint for everyone.

O-Dowel proudly manufactures all of its products in the USA.

Cortex

Bron  - wikipedia


PMO

De PMO is de bron van documentatie, begeleiding en metrics over de praktijk van projectbeheer en -uitvoering." Bron - wikipedia

aansturing voor uw project.

Her background includes working in the public sectoras an Assistant Development Control Officer at a Local Authority and in the private sector in a development environment with particular emphasis on the planning process in relation to traffic and transportation matters. Karen has extensive knowledge of the legal aspects and implications of the Highways Act 1980 on the planning process which enables her to provide expert support to clients.

She has been heavily involved in the preparation of numerous Transportation Assessments and Statements; Travel Plans; access appraisals; preparing and giving evidence as an expert witness for all types of planning appeals and the provision of a wide variety of advice to clients on all highway issues.

Her most recent position before taking up her current role with Fairfield Associates was as an Associate Director within a busy Traffic and Transportation team in a highway consultancy firm. Name: KSM Groep
Description:
KSM Groep - Een introductie. 

De stad Breda, gelegen in het zuiden van Nederland, is de thuisbasis van talloze bedrijven en organisaties die bijdragen aan de economische groei en de ontwikkeling van de regio. Een opvallend voorbeeld van zo'n bedrijf is de KSM Groep, een echt familiebedrijf dat sinds 1990 een prominente rol speelt in de wegenbouw sector, en sinds kort zijn stappen zet richting HVAC oplossingen. In deze uitgebreide omschrijving nemen we een diepgaande duik in de geschiedenis, activiteiten en waarden van de KSM Groep, met een focus op de twee dochterondernemingen: KSM Wegenbouw en KSM Milieuvoorzieningen.

De geschiedenis van de KSM Groep begint in 1990, toen het bedrijf werd opgericht door de heer R.A.J. van Bekhoven. Vanaf het allereerste begin was het duidelijk dat KSM Groep zich zou onderscheiden als een bedrijf met sterke familiewaarden en een diepgewortelde toewijding aan kwaliteit en integriteit. Deze kernwaarden zouden in de loop der jaren de drijvende kracht worden achter het succes van het bedrijf.

De oprichting van KSM Groep was een bescheiden begin, maar het bedrijf groeide gestaag en bouwde een uitstekende reputatie op in de Nederlandse bouwsector. Het vermogen om hoogwaardige diensten te leveren en de bereidheid om te investeren in innovatie en duurzaamheid hebben KSM Groep tot een gevestigde naam gemaakt in de branche. Het bedrijf heeft consequent de juiste balans weten te vinden tussen traditie en vooruitgang, en dit heeft bijgedragen aan de continuïteit en groei van de onderneming.

KSM Groep fungeert als de overkoepelende entiteit voor twee dochterondernemingen, namelijk KSM Wegenbouw en KSM Milieuvoorzieningen. Deze twee takken van het bedrijf richten zich elk op verschillende aspecten van de bouwsector en bieden gespecialiseerde diensten aan klanten in heel Nederland.

Compania noastră, înființată în 2015 din pasiunea pentru construcții, a fost creată cu scopul de a contrazice principiul „Lasă-mă că merge și așa”. Încă de la început, ne-am propus să lucrăm corect și transparent, atât față de beneficiarii noștri, cât și față de noi înșine, fără a face compromisuri în privința calității lucrărilor pe care le executăm.

Suntem guvernați de principii solide, pricepere, experiență și dorința de a crește împreună cu clienții noștri. Ne propunem să oferim soluții tehnice moderne care să asigure realizarea și optimizarea proiectelor la cel mai înalt standard de perfecțiune. Suntem pe deplin convinși că pentru a atinge succesul, trebuie să rămânem profesioniști și să ne concentrăm pe parteneriate de tip "win-win". De aceea, suntem flexibili și oferim suport tehnic înainte de începerea fiecărui proiect.

Heavy Load Expedition își desfășoară activitatea în conformitate cu legile din România, fiind înregistrată la Registrul Comerțului al Municipiului Cluj-Napoca, județul Cluj.

SIKDER ENTERPRISE, a leading construction company dedicated to shaping the future through excellence in building, roads, highways, and bridge construction which was founded in 19 November, 2013. With a steadfast commitment to quality, safety, and innovation, we have emerged as a trusted name in the construction industry.

Our mission is to play a pivotal role in shaping this vision by constructing structures that stand the test of time and elevate the quality of life for communities and individuals.

From concept to completion, we employ state-of-the-art technology, materials, and skilled craftsmanship to bring architectural visions to life. Our projects are not just structures; they are timeless pieces of art and functionality.

Roads and Highways: We take pride in our contributions to the development of efficient road networks and highways that connect communities and foster economic growth. Our teams are well-versed in road design, construction, and maintenance, ensuring durability and safety in all our projects.

Bridge Construction: Building bridges is not just our job; it's our passion. We have a proven track record of delivering iconic bridges that span rivers, valleys, and obstacles with grace and strength. Our bridge constructions exemplify the perfect blend of engineering expertise and aesthetic beauty.

Quality Assurance: We hold ourselves to the highest standards of quality control, ensuring that our projects meet or exceed industry benchmarks. Safety First: The safety of our workers and the public is paramount. We adhere to stringent safety protocols to create a secure environment for all.

Whether constructing, repairing, or demolishing bridges, highways, or sign structures, our experienced team is equipped to deliver complex, high-stakes projects with precision and professionalism.

Our Core Capabilities Include:
-Steel Erection
     ~Curved, skewed, and straight girders
     ~Skid-in girders
-Pre-Cast Concrete Erection
-Bridge Jacking & Realignment
-Bridge Demolition & Structural Repair
-Bridge Deck Replacement
     ~Shear studs
     ~Stay-in-place forms (SIP)
-Specialty Structures
     ~Barrel arches
     ~Sign structures
     ~Pin & hanger replacements
-Advanced Welding Services
 
At SSI, we are more than just a subcontractor—we are a solutions partner. Our team is dedicated to meeting the highest standards of safety, quality, and performance while exceeding expectations on every project.

Gjennom våre driftskontrakter har vi ansvar for at veiene er trygge, fremkommelige og godt vedlikeholdt – uavhengig av årstid og værforhold. Arbeidet utføres av erfarne fagfolk, støttet av moderne kjøretøy og utstyr tilpasset krevende forhold.

Solstein Infra kombinerer lokal tilstedeværelse med profesjonell gjennomføring. For oppdragsgiver betyr dette forutsigbar drift, rask respons og en samarbeidspartner som tar ansvar – hele året.

Name: Stan B Williams, I.R.A.M., LLC
Description:
Western Management Services - Construction, Inc. (WMS) is engaged in the business of providing construction contract administration services to construction project owners and contractors, with an emphasis on the identification, recognition, avoidance and management of public construction contract claims and disputes.

The president / principal of WMS is Stan B. Williams, Esq., Denver Colorado USA.  Mr. Williams is also the Managing Member of Williams Legal Services, LLC, which dba I.R.A.M., LLC.

Mr. Williams has a B.S. Industrial-Construction Management, Colorado State University Fort Collins, Colorado; and a Jurist Doctorate Degree, Denver University – Strum College of Law, Denver, Colorado

Mr. Williams is the developer and copyright owner of The Construction Claims and Disputes I.R.A.M. (Provisional Patent Pending), an Informational Website created specifically for construction companies and government inspectors working on government projects that are governed by the FAR and the Contract Disputes Act of 1978.

I.R.A.M. contains the eight (8) most common construction contract claims entitlement issues typically raised during the performance-phase of a government-owned highway, bridge or civil construction project:
o	Differing Site Conditions
o	Defective Contract Documents
o	Cardinal Contract Change
o	Directed Contract Change
o	Constructive Contract Change
o	Contract Acceleration
o	Contract Termination & Suspension
o	Contract Delays

Therefore, I.R.A.M. is tailor-made, and a must-have, for all parties, contractors and government inspectors as well, working on projects constructed under the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (IIJA) of 2022.

Sign up now for a one-year subscription to the I.R.A.M. Informational Website and for a limited time, receive free technical support in maximizing the use of your IRAM from the creator, Stan B Williams, Esq.  
Go to:  https://constructionclaimsanddisputes.com/subscribe-to-iram/

Name: Curso Superior de Tecnologia em Estradas - FATEC SP
Description:
O Curso Superior de Tecnologia em Estradas, anteriormente denominado Curso de Movimento de Terra e Pavimentação, foi estabelecido em 1970. Desde sua fundação, o programa consolidou-se como um pilar na formação de profissionais altamente qualificados para o dinâmico setor de infraestrutura viária.

Oficialmente reconhecido em 1974 e com a renovação de seu reconhecimento em 2023, o curso demonstra um compromisso contínuo com a excelência. Sua grade curricular é sistematicamente atualizada para refletir as demandas mais recentes do mercado e as inovações tecnológicas no setor. O foco primordial reside no desenvolvimento e na execução de projetos e obras de pavimentação, terraplenagem, sinalização viária, drenagem e recuperação de pavimentos.

Em 2022, o curso passou por uma substancial reestruturação, com significativas modificações em sua matriz curricular. Essa reformulação teve como objetivo primordial otimizar a preparação dos egressos para os desafios contemporâneos da indústria. A partir dessa atualização, o curso adotou a nova denominação de "Tecnologia em Estradas", o que reflete de forma mais precisa sua abrangência e sua adaptação às crescentes exigências da engenharia de transportes e infraestrutura. A formação oferecida confere aos alunos uma base robusta em técnicas e tecnologias avançadas, capacitando-os para atuar com competência no planejamento, coordenação e execução de obras viárias de grande porte.

Name: Ascquer
Description:
L'Ascquer est l'organisme certificateur français des équipements de la route, œuvrant pour l’évaluation des performances des équipements de la route et le suivi de leur fabrication. 
L’Ascquer est une Association loi 1901 à but non lucratif, et est l’organisme désigné par l’État Français pour délivrer la marque NF 058 « Équipements de la route » (sous mandat AFNOR) et notifié sous le numéro NB 1826 pour exécuter les tâches d’évaluation et de vérification de la conformité des performances pour le marquage CE : signalisation routière horizontale et verticale, dispositifs de retenue routiers et équipements électroniques (PMV, signaux). L'Ascquer a également développé depuis 2022 des programmes de certification sous sa marque ASCQUER REFERENCE. 
Depuis 1992, elle donne l’assurance écrite de la conformité des produits aux normes et aux exigences en vigueur : vérification des performances obtenues aux essais, audit initial puis inspection périodique des sites de fabrication. En complément, les produits NF 058 font l’objet de prélèvements annuels en usine, sur le terrain, et d’essais en laboratoire.

With a Prestigious mix of government and private sector clientele, including NHAI, MoRTH,  HSIIDC and  HSAMB, to name a few, we are pre-qualified to bid independently for EPC projects and HAM Projects. In addition, company is also owing 25 Acre land in the state of Madhya Pradesh for mining the material to be used in road construction projects & have installed their own crusher. This proprietary ownership has earned us the trust of marquee clientele and enabled us to achieve a robust and growing order book and deliver quality construction while meeting urgent timelines.
We attribute our success to the skills and dedication of our large and growing pool of people talent, which we constantly acknowledge, incentivise and nurture.
A highly environmentally conscious entity, we strive for enhanced sustainability at every stage of every project, all along our journey towards delivering excellence.

Name: The Hoosier Company, LLC.
Description:
The Hoosier Company, LLC. (“Hoosier”) is a privately held company with over 85 years of construction and highway safety product sales experience. Hoosier’s commitment to providing the highest level of service, safety, and quality has made us one of the most recognizable names in roadway safety and construction in the Midwest.
 Hoosier’s Sales Department is active in several states across the Midwest. Our products create safer highways and protect the motoring public from hazards on the nation’s roadways. We offer the latest technology and innovation from quality manufacturers including Valtir, Trinity Highway, Safe-Hit, PSS Innovations, Inc., and more.

 Hoosier’s Construction Department performs construction services, both as a prime contractor and a subcontractor, primarily within the state of Indiana. Construction services provided by Hoosier include the installation of traffic signals, highway signs, roadway lighting, installation of intelligent transportation systems, airport signs and lighting.

Hoosier’s reputation reflects a strong set of values which drives all of our efforts.

Name: MITS International
Description:
La société MITS, dont l'abréviation signifie Maintenance Industrielle et Travaux Spéciaux, a commencé à offrir divers services de gestion de projets dans le domaine du pétrole et du gaz, en particulier pour les gazoducs et les ouvrages connexes, depuis 2012.

Au fil du temps, elle a élargi sa gamme de services en travaillant avec des sociétés étrangères pour proposer des services spécialisés dans le milieu pétrolier tels que la détection de fuites de gaz, la maintenance des installations pétrolières et les revêtements spéciaux. Elle propose également des services de prestation de main-d'œuvre qualifiée, tels que des soudeurs, des tuyauteurs, des superviseurs et des ingénieurs.

MITS a élargi son champ d'activité en proposant des travaux de maintenance et d'entretien industriel dans divers secteurs, tels que la production industrielle, l'hôtellerie et l'agroalimentaire.

En 2019, MITS Sarl est devenue MITS International, une société à capital majoritaire étranger italien, avec une extension vers la mise à disposition d'équipements spéciaux de construction, ainsi que des services de gestion, d'assistance et de chiffrage des appels d'offres en Tunisie pour le compte des sociétés italiennes souhaitant explorer le marché tunisien.

MITS International s'engage à fournir un travail et des services professionnels de qualité tout en respectant les contraintes et les délais de ses clients.

Name: Agha Group
Description:
About Agha Group

With over eight years of experience in the industry, Agha Group has established itself as a leading provider of infrastructure and safety solutions. Since our founding, we have prioritized safety, quality, and innovation, delivering tailored solutions to meet the diverse needs of multiple sectors. Our extensive portfolio strengthens our position in areas such as highway safety, urban infrastructure, traffic management, and industrial solutions.

Our Vision and Values

At Agha Group, we strive not just to provide products but to deliver value across the industry. We embrace evolving technologies, uphold uncompromising quality, and place customer satisfaction at the heart of every project. Safety, durability, and aesthetics are at the core of everything we do.

Through continuous innovation, we aim to strengthen our leadership in the sector and invest in a safer, more sustainable future. By offering environmentally friendly and cost-effective solutions, we create lasting value for our clients, partners, and communities alike.

Naast de infrastructuurwerken, verzorgen we met onze containerdienst en recyclagecentrum ook het transport, de verwerking en recyclage van al uw bouwafval. Dankzij onze mobiele betoncentrale produceren we efficiënt gestabiliseerd zand, mager beton of steenslag type IA/IIA. Deze materialen zijn beschikbaar op onze site in Rumst of worden bij u op de werf geleverd.

L. JANSSENS nv is strategisch gelegen bij de E19 in Rumst. Met onze ervaring en knowhow realiseren we elk project aan de scherpste prijs. Daarbij staat veiligheid voorop. We beschikken dan ook over een VCA**-certificaat.

Name: Associated Contractors of New Mexico (ACNM)
Description:
The Associated Contractors of New Mexico (ACNM) is the leading voice of New Mexico’s transportation and utility construction industry. As one of 95 chartered members of the Associated General Contractors of America (AGC), ACNM has proudly served as the state's first AGC chapter since 1933.

ACNM is committed to being the premier industry association through exceptional advocacy, legislative involvement, workforce development, and strategic partnerships that support New Mexico’s infrastructure growth.

We deliver valuable services to our members in key areas including:

Workforce development & training
Legislative and regulatory engagement
Jobsite safety and industry best practices
Political action and advocacy
Business development
Promoting a strong, positive industry image
Many of these services are driven by ACNM’s active committees and task forces, which include members, agency leaders, and partners across the construction sector. In collaboration with AGC, we also provide access to national resources that enhance our ability to meet the diverse needs of our members.

Name: CAPULC - Canadian Association of Pipeline and Utility Locating Contractors
Description:
Welcome to CAPULC. We provide leadership, promote safety, and enhance the value and reputation of the underground facility locating industry. By establishing the highest possible standards for the industry, our objective is to present a generation of qualified, competent locating technicians, trained to excel in their field. Standardization and compliance to the rules and regulations will benefit everyone in the underground pipeline and utility locating industry.

Together we can encourage the locate industry, and the ground disturbance community to meet and exceed safety expectations, perform each job with due diligence, and govern the application of rules and regulations as they pertain to the industry.

CAPULC Endeavours to:

●  Define, establish and preserve the identity and the common interests of the underground facility locating industry.
●  Educate and promote better relations between members and governmental agencies, other associations, contractors, professional engineers, manufacturers, suppliers, utility companies, one call centers, the public and the underground facility locating industry.
●  Promote the practical application of knowledge related to the underground facility locating industry through education and ensure this education process is available to our members.
●  Collect and disseminate information relative to the business in which CAPULC members are engaged.
●  Promote ethical practices among underground facility locators and the general public.
●  Encourage safety in the conduct of work.
●  Represent the common interest of CAPULC members
●  Encourage the education of CAPULC members in the pursuit of underground facility locating in accordance with sound business principles.

Insbesondere Produkte für die Verkehrssicherheit haben bei uns eine lange Tradition - vom Kunststoffleitpfosten, über technisch anspruchsvolle Systeme wie Blendschutzanlagen, Leitwände und Auskreuzvorrichtungen an Autobahnen und Schnellstraßen bis hin zu Streugutbehältern und Brückenschutznetzen für den vorbeugenden Winterdienst, bietet MAIBACH ein breites Produktportfolio. Viele eigene Produkte für die Endausrüstung unserer Straßen sind im Lauf der Zeit hinzugekommen und werden immer weiter entwickelt. Innovation ist unser Antrieb!

So ist MAIBACH bereits seit 1993 im Bereich Amphibien- und Reptilienschutz in führender Position aktiv und hat zusammen mit Fachleuten aus Tierökologie und öffentlicher Verwaltung bereits früh technische Standards zum Bau von Amphibienschutzanlagen und höchst wirkungsvollen Leiteinrichtungen geschaffen.

Maibach Lärmschutzelemente aus Aluminium, Glas oder Holz schützen Anwohner und Passanten vor negativen Auswirkungen von Lärm in allen Bereichen. Schwerpunkt liegt aktuell im Gewerbebau, wir sind aber auch im Bereich Straßen-, Schienen- und Flugverkehr aktiv. Unsere Elemente zeichnen sich seit über 30 Jahren durch beste akustische Dämpfung und hohe Haltbarkeit aus.

Eine hohe Fahrrad- und Motorradverkehrssicherheit mittels geschütztem Radstreifen und durch sicheres Straßenkreuzungsdesign zählt für uns zu den wichtigsten Kriterien einer modernen städtischen Infrastruktur. Auch hier haben wir die passenden Produkte für Sie. Sprechen sie uns an!

Transformation is being achieved by adopting innovations, applying a programmatic approach, utilising digital rehearsals and embedding methods of construction such as off-site manufacture.There is a greater emphasis on digital technology, increased efficiency and standardisation.

All align with National Highways’ three imperatives of improving safety, creating a better customer experience and delivering greater efficiency.

Op onze website vind je informatie over onze bedrijven, partnerships en projecten. We weten dat deze informatie niet compleet is. Daarom komen we graag bij je langs voor een kennismaking. Hopelijk raak je na het bekijken van onze website geïnspireerd om jouw technische vragen aan ons voor te leggen. Wij gaan die uitdaging graag met volle energie aan!

Name: JP "Putevi Srbije" - PE "Roads of Serbia"
Description:
ЈП „Путеви Србије“ обавља стручне послове који се односе на трајно, непрекидно и квалитетно одржавање и заштиту, експлоатацију, изградњу, реконструкцију, организацију и контролу наплате путарине, развој и управљање државним путевима првог и другог реда у Републици Србији.
Основни циљ ЈППС јесте очување вредности мреже путева и њено побољшање, одржавање путева, улагања у изградњу, рехабилитацију, реконструкцију, као и израду студија и пројеката. Сва улагања су у складу са стратешким опредељењем Републике Србије у сектору друмског транспорта да се функционално интегрише у европску мрежу путева. 

ЈП „Путеви Србије“ брине и о безбедности саобраћаја кроз отклањање опасних места, као и о заштити животне средине кроз елиминисање или смањење штетних утицаја путева и саобраћаја на животну средину, поштујући све прописане процедуре у складу са Законом Републике Србије.

ЈП „Путеви Србије“ пружа услуге електронске наплате путарине (ЕНП), дозволе за бесплатне проласке ауто-путем, градске карте и претплатне карте.

Побољшање саобраћајних веза ЈП „Путеви Србије“ постиже кроз квалитетно, ефикасно и равномерно повезивање привредних подручја, покрајина и региона унутар Републике Србије, посебно стављајући акценат на побољшање транспортних веза између развијенијих и мање развијених подручја. Истовремено се ради на ефикаснијем повезивању Републике Србије са суседним земљама, повећањем протока саобраћаја отклањањем уских грла у пограничним зонама. Саобраћајна и економска валоризација географског, међународног и саобраћајног положаја Републике Србије у окружењу постиже се активним учешћем у интегративним процесима региона Западног Балкана, Југоисточне Европе и Дунавске регије. Уједно, посебна пажња се поклања укључивању у систем брзих саобраћајница европског значаја, намењених првенствено транзитном и туристичком саобраћају, пре свега на Коридору 10.

Name: Alabama Road Builders Association
Description:
Established in1947, the Alabama Road Builders Association (ARBA) is dedicated to serving the specific needs of businesses involved in Alabama's transportation construction industry. We serve contractors, material suppliers, consulting engineers, and other professional service firms. We are the industry's forum for open communication with the Alabama Department of Transportation and other governmental agencies. Conveniently located down the street from the Alabama Statehouse and Capitol, ARBA is housed in its own building. ARBA is considered the headquarters for our industry and has a full-time staff ready to serve you.

ARBA is a nonprofit organization of individuals and business firms actively engaged in the construction of transportation systems or in furnishing materials, equipment,, or services for such construction. ARBA is governed by its officers and Board of Directors, consisting of a President, Immediate Past President, Vice President, Treasurer, Secretary, and Directors from all over the state. Committees are also established to address certain needs of the Association and its membership.

The mission of ARBA is to foster and promote the finest in transportation for the state of Alabama.

Name: InQuik
Description:
InQuik is a technology innovation company headquartered in Heatherbrae, New South Wales, Australia. With fabrication facilities across the country and a growing global footprint, InQuik’s core business is licensing its patented bridge technology to partners around the world.

The InQuik Bridge System is a semi-modular, in-situ poured reinforced concrete solution designed for rapid deployment, exceptional durability, and minimal maintenance over a 100-year design life. Engineered for resilience against extreme weather events, InQuik bridges are environmentally friendly and enable the use of local labour, plant, and materials—empowering communities and reducing logistical complexity. Since its inception, InQuik has delivered over 200 bridges across New South Wales, Victoria, Queensland, and the Pacific.

The InQuik Construction Method isn't limited to bridges, we have solutions across maritime, buildings and defense, which has had significant recognition around the world. 

Global Reach & Local Impact
InQuik partners with governments, councils, disaster relief agencies, and road authorities to deliver cost-effective infrastructure solutions. Through licensing, InQuik enables international collaborators to manufacture and deploy its systems locally, expanding access to safe, sustainable infrastructure worldwide. 

Certifications & Recognition
•	ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001
•	JAS-ANZ accredited
•	Member of the Association of Iron & Steel Technology
 AIST TC Graham Prize for Innovation (2019)
 ABC Conference – Most Innovative Accelerated Bridge Construction System (2021)
 Austroads Bridge Conference – Most Innovative Project (2022)
 Finalist – Sir William Hudson Award, Australian Engineering Excellence Awards (2020)

Locations

Name: West Coast Expressway
Description:
The West Coast Expressway (WCE), a highway project approved by the Government and managed by West Coast Expressway Sdn Bhd (WCE), is reshaping connectivity along the western corridor of Malaysia. Spanning 320 kilometers, WCE traverses from Banting, Selangor to Taiping, Perak, encompassing a segment of the Federal Route 5 (FR 5) upgraded by JKR.

Since its inception in 2015, WCE has been a catalyst for enhanced accessibility and economic transformation. The first four sections opened their lanes to the public in 2019, and as we move into 2023, four more sections are poised to greet travelers by year-end. Anticipated completion of the remaining three sections (3, 4 & 7) is slated for 2024/25, marking the fulfillment of WCE's comprehensive alignment.

Há mais de 17 anos, temos o privilégio de contribuir para o desenvolvimento do nosso país, através de 'Obras de Arte' que conectam pessoas, cidades e oportunidades.

Nossa missão é projetar e construir com eficiência estruturas que potencializa a locomobilidade de recursos ou pessoas para a Sociedade. Além de construir estruturas; é sobre construir futuros, possibilitar o crescimento econômico e social, e deixar um legado de progresso para as gerações futuras.

Nossos principais serviços são:
- Soluções de Apoio Náutico: Nossas soluções de apoio náutico incluem balsas com guindaste, balsas com munck, rebocadores/empurradores, catamarãs e guinchos de atracação. Com uma frota diversificada e equipe especializada, oferecemos suporte completo para projetos em ambientes aquáticos.

- Locação de Equipamentos: Precisa de equipamentos de qualidade para sua obra? Na RIO MAR, oferecemos uma ampla variedade de opções, desde guindastes até perfuratrizes offshore de circulação reversa. Conheça nossos modelos e escolha a melhor opção para o seu projeto.

- Serviços de Fundações Especiais: Com mais de 30 anos de experiência, somos especialistas em serviços de fundações especiais. Desde estacas escavadas em solo até estacas perfuradas em rocha, utilizamos diversas metodologias para garantir a estabilidade e segurança das estruturas.

- Fabricação de Estruturas Metálicas: Nossa equipe realiza a calandragem e soldagem de diversas estruturas metálicas, incluindo camisas metálicas, berços e cantilevers. Com tecnologia avançada e padrões de qualidade rigorosos, garantimos a entrega de produtos duráveis e confiáveis.

Name: Louisiana Bridge Builders
Description:
Louisiana Bridge Builders (“LBB”) is designing and building the new I-10 Calcasieu River Bridge in Lake Charles, Louisiana (USA) for the Louisiana Department of Transportation and Development (LADOTD). LBB will also be responsible for the 5.5 miles of reconstruction of interstate highway, various structures, ramps, and approaches between I-210 West End and Ryan Street. LBB will implement a ‘free flow’ toll and remove the existing bridge. The new infrastructure will be built with environmentally friendly construction techniques to minimize the impact on the Lake Charles area.

The bridge, which is part of the I-10 interstate highway and is the largest project in the history of the LADOTD, will replace the 70-year-old existing crossing, dramatically increase capacity, reduce congestion, improve travel times, and increase safety for Louisiana, the wider national interstate highway network, and the 70,000+ cars and trucks that use it daily. The final design, intended to preserve and recognize the heritage of the historic bridge, will be determined in cooperation with the LADOTD and the local community.

Name: Via Mühlhausen Thüringen
Description:
Via Mühlhausen Thüringen, a subsidiary of VINCI Highways, is the concession company responsible for designing, financing, building, and operating the new B247 federal road in Northern Thuringia. This project is Germany’s first federal road delivered under a Public-Private Partnership (PPP).

Awarded to VINCI Highways by the DEGES in 2021, this 30-year contract covers a 24-kilometer section of the B247 between Mühlhausen and Bad Langensalza. The works mobilize more than 250 people on site, alongside a fleet of over 60 excavators, bulldozers, and 90 trucks — moving 1.8 million cubic metres of earth and laying around 280,000 tonnes of asphalt.

Once in operation, Via Mühlhausen Thüringen will operate and maintain the section, upholding the highest service and safety standards for all road users.

This landmark project combines VINCI Highways' international expertise in road operation with the construction capabilities of VINCI Construction subsidiaries, working hand in hand to deliver a new mobility corridor for Thuringia.

VINCI Highways is the first road concessionaire in Germany, with 5 A-Modells in operations or construction. Across the world, VINCI Highways operates a network of 3750 km in 14 countries.

Masfalt dysponuje siecią 8 strategicznie zlokalizowanych wytwórni MM-A oraz 3 wytwórniami mobilnymi, które obsługują różne kontrakty w Polsce. Nasze możliwości logistyczne i produkcyjne oraz elastyczność działania pozwalają nam na efektywną współpracę z różnymi segmentami rynku -  zarówno z lokalnymi partnerami jak i  jak również z generalnymi wykonawcami o ogólnopolskim profilu działania. 

Od roku 2000 spółka Masfalt jest częścią  CRH, globalnego producenta oraz dostawcy szerokiego asortymentu materiałów budowanych oraz innowacyjnych rozwiązań, wykorzystywanych do realizacji wielu infrastrukturalnych projektów inwestycyjnych. CRH prowadzi działalność w 28 krajach w około 3 800 lokalizacjach głównie w Ameryce Północnej i Europie. W Polsce Grupa CRH jest największym producentem materiałów budowlanych. CRH plc jest notowana na londyńskiej i nowojorskiej giełdach papierów wartościowych i według miesięcznika Fortune należy do 500 największych spółek na świecie.

Name: Alfieri Impianti srl
Description:
L’azienda nasce nel 1962 grazie all’opera del suo ambizioso fondatore, Antonio Alfieri, che in quell’anno avvia una ditta individuale che si occupa di impianti elettrici civili e pubblica illuminazione.


Oggi l’azienda continua ad operare nel settore edile ed impiantistico sempre coerentemente con i principi che l’hanno caratterizzata sin dalla nascita: affidabilità e correttezza. Lungi dall’essere valori fuori moda e fuori dal mercato questi elementi costituiscono il patrimonio immateriale irrinunciabile per l’impresa Alfieri Impianti, valori che le hanno garantito reputazione e fidelizzazione della clientela.

Consapevole di operare in un mercato competitivo ed esigente, l’Alfieri Impianti ha deciso di ispirare la propria gestione ai più moderni principi di organizzazione aziendale e di adottare i sistemi di gestione qualità e sicurezza proposti dalle norme UNI EN ISO 9001:2015 e ISO 45001:2018.

Con lo sguardo sempre rivolto al futuro l’Alfieri Impianti si rivolge a mercati sempre più differenziati che rispondano alle più moderne esigenze, come quella dell’energia sostenibile e dell’implementazione su vasta scala delle tecnologie di telecomunicazione.


Grazie alle capacità e alla caparbietà del suo titolare, l’impresa è cresciuta, diventando una realtà imprenditoriale affermata su tutto il territorio nazionale.

Nel corso degli anni questo progetto imprenditoriale ha attinto nuova linfa dalla famiglia Alfieri, infatti i figli di Antonio sono entrati a far parte dell’azienda, che ben presto ha mutato veste giuridica diventando Alfieri Impianti & C. s.a.s. prima e Alfieri Impianti s.r.l. poi.

Name: SENSICAL
Description:
Sensical rüstet gebaute Infrastruktur mit innovativer faseroptischer Sensorik aus, um genaueste Informationen über den Zustand des Bauwerks zu gewinnen. Das Anwendungsfeld umfasst Straßenbrücken, Eisenbahnbrücken sowie Bauwerke der Energie- und Wasserversorgung.

Die hochauflösenden Messdaten sind die Basis für eine neue Qualität der Analyse des Bauwerksverhaltens. Die verteilte Messung von Deformationen erlaubt die frühzeitige Verfolgung von Rissbildung und Rissaktivität. Risse werden lückenlos erkannt und die Rissbreiten genauestens bestimmt.

Sensical kombiniert dies mit spezieller Analysesoftware und schafft tiefes Verständnis der wirkenden Mechanismen. So können Sicherheit, Lebensdauer und Wirtschaftlichkeit des Bauwerks zuverlässig bewertet werden. Dies ermöglicht die präzise Planung von Umfang und Zeitpunkt erforderlicher Maßnahmen und erlaubt die Nutzung von Tragwerksreserven.

Name: JT Russell & Sons
Description:
Since 1939, JT Russell & Sons, has grown from working in the farming industry to a major heavy highway and civil construction company. Our personnel and equipment have evolved with the major advancements in the construction industry to include GPS assisted grading and asphalt paving, drone assisted 3D mapping, and real time tracking of inventories and deliveries. Our crews install hundreds of miles of quality asphalt per year, with material that is produced at our very own facilities, where we can better manage supply. Over the past 20 years, we have completed numerous projects for the North Carolina Department of Transportation (NCDOT) including the majority of widening highway 24/27 from Charlotte to Albemarle, the Troy (Montgomery County) By-pass, and several roundabouts in Stanly and Union Counties.

In 1966 JTR made a move to become practical and environmentally friendly. We recycle previously used materials such as asphalt, concrete, rock and brick. We provide our customers with numerous recycled products such as gravel rock, rip rap, brick chips, crushed concrete, screenings and topsoil. For larger projects JTR has the capability of providing on-site recycling, which makes cost more effective for the market.

With a modest start of a few vehicles over 50 years ago we now have Over 65 trucks that can haul aggregates as well as liquid asphalt. We believe in quality vehicles, quality service, and quality employees.

We currently have 5 hot mix asphalt plants. At each of our locations we are able to produce base, intermediate, or surface. JTR mixes are designed for NCDOT projects, airport projects, and various commercial and residential applications. We supply NCDOT qualified mixes from all of our HMA plants located in Conover, Charlotte, and New London, each with full Quality Control (QC) labs on site.

Name: Haulr LLC
Description:
Haulr is a comprehensive solution for dispatching trucks to construction projects, streamlining the entire process through a user-friendly mobile application for both project supervisors and drivers. By replacing paper tickets with e-tickets, Haulr ensures accurate tracking of critical data, such as ClockIn, ClockOut times, and the details of each trip made. This not only eliminates paperwork but also provides essential information to resolve invoicing discrepancies and enables faster, more accurate payments.

How It Works
1. Sign Up & Get Verified
2. Browse & Accept Jobs
3. ShowUp to Work, Clock In, Haul, Clock Out
4. Get Paid

Join the Haulr Driver Network
Enjoy the freedom of flexible work with the reliability of a trusted platform. Whether you're an independent driver or part of a fleet, Haulr is here to help you succeed.

Why Haulr is right choice? 

1. Real-Time Job Tracking —— Track your routes, Clock In and Clock Out with location and time stamps. Everything is logged for accuracy and transparency.
2. Flexible Scheduling —— Work when you want. Accept jobs that fit your availability — daily, weekly, or one-time gigs.
3. Ontime Payment  —— Know exactly what you’ll earn, get paid weekly.
4. Steady Work, Your Way —— Access a consistent stream of hauling jobs suited to your truck type. From single loads to large projects, you choose what works for you.
5. Easy to Use ——  driver-friendly app makes it simple to view available jobs, accept requests, navigate to the site, and log your work.
6. Driver Protection —— All our Drivers comes with Insurance, follow our best practices. 
7. Preferred Drivers  —— Invite them over to Haulr and Dispatch Jobs direct to the tracks and drivers you like to work. 
8. Explore as a guest ——   Not ready to sign up? Explore features without creating an account.

Name: Mayo Construction Company Inc.
Description:
From our base in Cavalier, North Dakota, Mayo Construction has been building roads across the state for over 100 years. In 1923 our founder Joe Mayo purchased a steam engine with the intention of starting a custom harvesting business. However, he soon found his talents better suited to road construction, which has remained the family business for three generations. During World War II, Joe sold his equipment to help with the war effort. Following the war, his son John rebuilt the company and expanded its capabilities. In the late 1970s Joe’s grandsons Tim, Greg and Joe once again reformed the company to focus on paving.

Today our specialty remains asphalt paving. With two portable asphalt paving plants and auxiliary equipment, our crew is capable of placing nearly one million ton of paving materials every year. In addition to new road construction, we’ve expanded our capabilities to include asphalt restoration specialties such as milling, dirt work, and microsurfacing.

Mayo Construction competes mostly on the open market through the competitive bid process on government contracts, typically ranging from $550,000 to $10 million in size. We operate as a non-union, general contractor with approximately 130 employees during peak summer construction season. Annual sales typically range from $50 million to $100 million.

In 2012, Mayo Construction officially became a 100 percent employee-owned company.

Name: Shasyaz Contracting LTD
Description:
Executive Summary

Shasyaz (Little Grizzly) Contracting Ltd is a road building/road maintenance/site leveling contractor located in the remote community of Fort St. James, BC. It is an indigenous owned company, and part of Takla Lake First Nation Band. Shasyaz specializes in supporting the mineral exploration and logging industries in northern British Columbia and surrounding areas. Formally incorporated in January 2020, the company is owned by Ludwig “Wasi” Lepka, a long-time resident of the area. 

Wasi grew up around heavy equipment. He was trained by his father, Burkhard Lepka (Lepka Holdings LTD). Burkhard established himself as a well-known local contractor in the early 1980’s, and as a result, Wasi was operating bulldozers/excavators long before he could legally drive a passenger vehicle.

Wasi began his career in support of his father’s company, Lepka Holdings Ltd. Since then, he has worked in high-traffic, urban environments that required strict attention to detail. He has also worked in the rugged backcountry of northern BC, where resourcefulness and practical know-how can often mean the difference between life and death. 

After working for several years for other local regional contractors (Hat Lake Logging, Shelara Holdings, Newland Enterprises, and Takla Lake First Nation), Wasi decided to venture out and start his own company, Shasyaz Contracting LTD, which is now embarking on its own journey. It is intent on building Wasi's reputation as a dependable contractor, who is willing to work in remote locations of northern BC, where few others are willing to venture. Wasi has 25 years of experience working in remote settings where rigorous environmental oversights apply. He has worked in urban settings as well, which require strict attention to overhead and underground hazards, as well as finishing grade.

Business Structure and Background

Shasyaz Contracting Ltd was incorporated January of 2020, in the Province of British Columbia.

Founded in 1990 in Thakurmunda, Odisha, Paibarty Construction is a trusted government infrastructure development company specializing in the construction of bridges, roads, highways, and high-rise buildings. Today, Paibarty Construction is managed by Bijay Nanda Paibarty, under the continued mentorship of Basanta Kumar Paibarty, ensuring continuity of values, operational excellence, and strategic expansion into new sectors and states.

What began with a team of 10 employees has now grown into an organization of 50+ permanent professionals, along with 100+ skilled laborers engaged on short- and long-term project contracts. Our workforce embodies our core values of quality, safety, innovation, reliability, on-time delivery, honesty, and hard work — values that guide every project we execute.

Over the years, Paibarty Construction has successfully delivered numerous government infrastructure projects, including the landmark Bhimkund Statue and Bhimkund Area Infrastructure Development, along with 30+ completed bridges and 60+ road projects, ranging from rural connectivity roads to large-scale highway developments. Our continued partnerships with government agencies, contractors, and infrastructure developers reflect our strong reputation for consistency, technical competence, and ethical execution.

As we build upon our legacy, our long-term vision is to expand operations across multiple states and strengthen our presence in high-rise buildings and advanced infrastructure development, contributing to modern, sustainable, and inclusive growth.

Name: IABMAS 2026
Description:
Welcome to IABMAS 2026 in Orlando, Florida, U.S.A., known as the City Beautiful! The conference theme, "Smart and Sustainable Bridges for the Future," to explore innovative solutions that will re-shape the future of bridge engineering. The objectives of IABMAS 2026 are to address all aspects of bridge maintenance, safety, and management. Specific emphasis will be on bridge repair and rehabilitation issues, bridge management systems, the needs of bridge owners, financial planning, life-cycle evaluation costing, and investment for the future. Additionally, the conference will focus on bridge-related safety, risk, and economic issues. The implications and applications of AI, Digital Twins, Robotics in the management of existing bridge stocks are also among the relevant objectives. IABMAS 2026 aims to act as a forum for academics, practitioners, owners, and operators to discuss recent advances and identify future research directions. Together, we will share knowledge, inspire progress, and strengthen connections within our vibrant international community. We look forward to welcoming you in Orlando in July 2026.

Conference Chairs
F. Necati Catbas and Hae-Bum Yun (University of Central Florida)
Dan M. Frangopol (Lehigh University)

Name: Diamond Surface, Inc.
Description:
Improving driving surface texture is essential for roadside accident prevention, noise reduction, increased tread-pavement interlock, decreased fuel consumption, and overall ride quality.

At DSI, we believe diamond grinding is the best long-term solution to extend the life of worn or slightly irregular concrete roadways and surfaces. Using state-of-the-art grinding equipment, including our revolutionary PC6000 grinders, and advanced concrete pavement restoration techniques, we can repair both concrete and asphalt pavement surfaces like bridge decks and other ride/skid problems that may affect driver safety and comfort.

Some of the benefits of pavement diamond grinding and concrete restoration include better ride quality, exterior noise reduction as well as increased friction, improved pavement performance and driver safety, better roadway aesthetics as well as lower fuel consumption which lessens our overall carbon footprint.

DSI provides a full suite of innovative services to decrease pavement irregularities and improve surface quality. From highways, roads, and local streets to airfields, our experienced crews can handle any project, no matter how large or complicated.

Name: Midwest Fence Corporation
Description:
Founded in 1947, Midwest Fence Corporation is one of the oldest and most trusted commercial fence contractors in the Chicago region. Family-owned for over 75 years, we specialize exclusively in commercial, industrial, and public works projects — delivering union-installed fencing, highway guardrail, bridge rail, access control, security gates, temporary fence systems, and AISC-certified steel fabrication.

Our work spans Illinois and beyond, with projects on expressways, airports, rail yards, schools, data centers, logistics hubs, stadiums, and municipal facilities. We partner with leading general contractors and public agencies, providing safe, precise, and schedule-driven execution on complex, high-profile jobs.

With more than 150 years of combined estimating experience and a large in-house fabrication shop, Midwest Fence can handle everything from high-volume production to custom steel solutions. Whether fabricating bridge rail for an IDOT project or designing secure gates for a restricted-access facility, our team is trusted for technical knowledge, craftsmanship, and reliability.

We are AISC Certified for bridge and highway metal components, ensuring fabrication meets the highest industry standards. We are also Avetta and ISNetworld verified, with fully union crews badged for high-security sites including airports, federal facilities, and data centers.

Our reputation is built on partnership, integrity, and long-term relationships with general contractors, municipalities, and infrastructure owners. From bid to build, we aim to be the subcontractor you never have to chase — delivering responsive communication, compliance-ready documentation, and results that last.

Proud Member Of:
American Fence Association
Illinois Road & Transportation Builders Association
Associated General Contractors – Illinois & Chicagoland Chapters
National Ornamental & Miscellaneous Metals Association
American Institute of Steel Construction (Certification)

„GEVALDA“ – nuo 2011 m. veikianti kelių, gatvių ir tiltų statybos bendrovė, kurios pagrindas – profesionali, auganti ir ambicinga komanda. Šiandien įmonė vienija daugiau nei 200 darbuotojų, kurių patirtis ir įsitraukimas į veiklą tapo mūsų sėkmės garantu.
Mūsų veiklos spektras apima kelių ir gatvių tiesimą bei remontą, tiltų, viadukų ir kitų transporto bei hidrotechnikos statinių statybą, aplinkos ir teritorijų tvarkymą, betono gamybą, lauko inžinerinius tinklus ir projektavimą. Dirbame visoje Lietuvoje, įgyvendindami tiek viešuosius, tiek privačius projektus.
Siekdami aukščiausios kokybės ir didžiausio efektyvumo, projektuose taikome procesų valdymo metodus, padedančius optimizuoti ir standartizuoti veiklą. „GEVALDA“ buvo pirmoji Lietuvoje, įsigijusi mechanizuotą trinkelių klojimo aparatą, betono klotuvą. Bendrovė nuolat investuoja į modernią techniką bei darbuotojų kvalifikacijos stiprinimą.
Mūsų tikslas – augti per nuolatinį mokymąsi, tobulėjimą ir geriausiųjų praktikų taikymą, siekiant būti konkurencingais ir patikimais partneriais rinkoje.
Mūsų stiprybė – žmonės, technologijos ir atsakomybė už kiekvieną įsipareigojimą. Kuriame infrastruktūrą, kuri ne tik jungia miestus, bet ir kuria galimybes žmonėms bei verslui.
 www.gevalda.lt

Name: Hubaut  (Travaux Publics - Openbare Wegeniswerken)
Description:
Services
Du terrassement, en passant par l’égouttage et le raccordement, aux travaux de voiries, grâce à notre vaste sélection d’engins et nos équipes qualifiées, nous pouvons répondre à tous vos projets tant dans le domaine privé que public.

Mais pas que… En hiver, lorsque le mauvais temps nous joue des tours, nous sommes appelés afin de déneiger et sabler les axes principaux et les autoroutes du Tournaisis et des communes voisines.

Entreprise
Fondée en 1946 par la famille Hubaut à Gaurain. L’entreprise s’est agrandie et est venue s’installer, en 2005, dans les bâtiments de l’ancienne briqueterie de Havinnes, Grand Chemin 288 à Tournai. Ce vaste terrain de huit hectares accueille entre autres les ateliers de Hubaut, Recytour et Forec, le parc automobile, la section administrative ainsi qu’une équipe d’une quarantaine de collaborateurs.

Notre société dispose ainsi de toutes les infrastructures nécessaires afin d’être à votre service à tout moment. Hubaut c’est maintenant et dans le futur !

Forte d’une équipe jeune et dynamique ainsi que de sa capacité à assurer elle-même sa propre maintenance, notre société vous offre une plus-value incontestable.

Au fil des années, la société s’est développée et est devenue une entreprise polyvalente qui s’est en outre spécialisée dans trois domaines, sous les noms suivants : Hubaut (terrassement et construction de routes), Forec (concassage et criblage mobile) et Recytour (recyclage de déchets inertes).

Name: Dinas Pekerjaan Umum Bina Marga dan Penataan Ruang Kabupaten Bojonegoro

Description:
Chapco Construction LLC is excited to announce our newly established
presence in the heavy civil market to service the greater Northern California
construction industry.

Chapco’s mission is to help connect communities by providing concrete
structures through innovative, eBicient and safe methods as our team

companies. Now, we look forward to doing the same successful work but
launch forward doing so under a new brand and name.
While Chapco as an entity is new, our team is experienced, established and

• CIP Concrete Slab and Box Girder Bridges

utilities, installation and removal of water diversion systems, demolition,
curb, gutter and sidewalks.

Name: Bonaventura Infrastruktur GmbH
Description:
Mit einer Gesamtstrecke von 51 Kilometern, vier Tunneln und 100 Brückenbauwerken verantwortet Bonaventura Infrastruktur GmbH die südliche  A5 Nordautobahn im Weinviertel. 

Die Strecke ist ein Vorzeigemodell, wie Verkehrs-Infrastruktur und ökologische Verantwortung vereinbar sind. Österreichs erstes Public Private Partnership-Projekt (PPP) im hochrangigen Straßenverkehr wurde im Auftrag der ASFINAG errichtet. 
Bis zum Konzessionsende im Jahr 2039 liegt die Hauptaufgabe der Gesellschaft mit ihrem 50-köpfigen Team neben dem sicheren und kundenfreundlichen Betrieb der Strecke in der Verwaltung, dem Umweltmanagement und der vorausschauende Substanzerhaltung der Streckenabschnitte. 

Als erste österreichische Projektgesellschaft der französischen Meridiam-Gruppe brachte Bonaventura von Anfang an internationales Know-how im Bereich nachhaltigem Infrastrukturmanagement ein und verwirklicht neben einer Übererfüllung der Umweltauflagen auch zahlreiche ökologische Projekte. Damit leistet das Unternehmen innerhalb seines langfristigen Engagements einen aktiven Beitrag zur Lebensqualität in der Region im Rahmen der UN-Nachhaltigkeitsziele.

NTEMP designed, built and financed the $2.1 billion North Tarrant Express project and the $1.6 billion North Tarrant Express I-35W project, working closely with the Texas Department of Transportation (TxDOT) and the local communities. The reconstruction included expanded frontage lanes and main lanes, as well as the addition of bypass lanes and TEXpress Lanes (managed lanes) along I-820, SH-121/183 Airport Freeway and I-35W. In total, the North Tarrant Express project includes 23.4 miles of NTE TEXpress Lanes in Tarrant County. 

These two expansive reconstruction projects are successfully alleviating traffic congestion along two of the busiest highway corridors in North Texas and the state, with more than 350,000 trips per day along that stretch of highway.

Name: Centre of Excellence for Decarbonising Roads
Description:
The Centre of Excellence for Decarbonising Roads was established to bring together the UK roads sector to enable a significant step change on our path to net-zero. We are focused on identifying, developing, trialling and sharing innovative, low carbon materials for use across our highways.

The Centre is led by North Lanarkshire Council and Transport for West Midlands, in partnership with Amey and Colas, and we are joined by experts from across the private, public and academic sectors.

If you are interested in partnering with us or submitting your innovation to our materials testing programme, contact us today.

The Centre is funded by the Department for Transport through ADEPT Live Labs 2: Decarbonising Local Roads, a three year, UK-wide, £30 million programme. Live Labs 2 trials innovative decarbonisation proposals from local highways authority (LHA) led public-private joint ventures, with a particular focus on the decarbonisation of Scope 2 and 3 emissions in the construction, operations, maintenance, and decommissioning phases of the local road networks' life cycle.

Description:
Infrea provide services within infrastructure, within the business areas Civil engineering & Public works and Water and Sewage.  

Civil engineering & Public works, earthworks and laying asphalt are important elements as communities grow and expand their infrastructure. Infrea’s subsidiaries have the skills to handle the entire chain in earthworks and construction. 

Infrea has its own construction equipment and resources for asphalt production, which ensures great flexibility and control. Customers include states and municipalities, as well as private companies and organizations. 

In Water and Sewage, clean water from the tap and pipes that carry away our wastewater are taken for granted in society today. Infrea’s subsidiary offers water and sewage services to ensure that what we don’t see still works. 

Infrea carries out pipe inspections with cameras, slurry removal, high-pressure flushing, dry suction, feeding of pipes and transport of hazardous waste and residual water. Customers include states, municipalities, county councils, industry and the private sector.

The business strategy is to acquire and develop businesses with sound foundation and clear improvement potential, grow geographically, and continue to develop owned companies through long-term commitment and entrepreneurship.

Respekt
Respekt i våra relationer skapar en grund av positiv energi som genomsyrar hela vår organisation.

Ständigt utveckla oss själva, arbetssätt och teknik.

Name: Brent Spence Bridge Corridor
Description:
The Brent Spence Bridge was constructed in the 1960s to carry approximately 80,000 vehicles a day, but the daily I-75/I-71 traffic load has reached 160,000 vehicles in recent years. Because I-75 is a key freight corridor stretching from Canada to Florida, the congestion impacts commerce and commuters who travel the corridor in the eastern United States.

Stretching from the Western Hills Viaduct in Ohio to Dixie Highway in Kentucky, the Brent Spence Bridge Corridor Project will be built without tolls and transform an eight-mile portion of the I-75/71 interstate corridor, including a new companion bridge immediately to the west of the existing bridge. More information about the project is available at BrentSpenceBridgeCorridor.com.

Name: Miami Tunnel
Description:
Welcome to the Gateway of PortMiami! Miami Tunnel is a 4,200-ft twin-bore tunnel providing a toll-free route to vibrant PortMiami while upholding the nation's highest safety standards. 

Built to deflect heavy traffic in downtown Miami, the tunnel reduced cargo truck traffic by nearly 80%. Today, approximately 9,000 automobiles and 4,000 trucks pass through daily. 

Miami Tunnel connects SR A1A/MacArthur Causeway to Dodge Island, providing direct access between the seaport and highways I-395 and I-95. In addition to the Port Bridge, Miami Tunnel creates another entry point to PortMiami, keeping our community's second-largest economic generator competitive. 

In 2022, PortMiami welcomed 26.5 million visitors who spent $20.8 billion exploring the amazing destination we call home!

By connecting SR A1A/MacArthur Causeway to Dodge Island, the project  provides direct access between the seaport and highways I-395 and I-95, create another entry to PortMiami in addition to the Port Bridge to keep  PortMiami, the community’s second largest economic generator, competitive.

Additionally, The POMT  improves traffic flow in downtown Miami by reducing the number of cargo trucks and cruise related vehicles on congested downtown streets, and aids ongoing and future development in and around downtown Miami.

Esse compromisso é renovado, diariamente, através dos investimentos em melhorias ao longo da malha viária e na capacitação de seus profissionais.
As melhorias realizadas pela Renovias nas rodovias administradas por ela, fazem com que caminhos sejam abertos para a instalação de novas empresas, incentivando, assim, o crescimento da produção industrial, além do desenvolvimento econômico do comércio e do ramo de serviços.
