Azienda familiare con profonde radici nel territorio, dove opera da 60 anni, oggi è gestita dalla sua terza generazione. 

Negli anni ha saputo adeguare le proprie professionalità alla crescente complessità di lavorazioni e progetti, avviando e sviluppando cantieri complessi e occupandosi, per grandi clienti privati, di movimenti terra, nuova viabilità interna ed esterna, fognature e urbanizzazioni, opere civili e pavimentazione industriale, pavimentazioni ecologiche a basso impatto ambientale e colorate. 

La mission aziendale è garantire la qualità nella costruzione e nella manutenzione di infrastrutture stradali, offrendo un’accurata progettazione e un attento sviluppo dell’intero processo produttivo e realizzativo con uno sguardo attento alla sostenibilità e riuso dei materiali destinati al rifiuto nella produzione dei propri conglomerati bituminosi. 

Uno staff giovane di tecnici e specialisti si occupa della progettazione e squadre di operai qualificati  realizzano i lavori. 
L’azienda è dotata di un impianto di produzione tecnologicamente avanzato volto a garantire elevati standard di efficienza e sostenibilità ambientale mediante il reimpiego di materiali riciclati. 

Una forte vocazione alla ricerca e innovazione ha negli anni guidato l’attività dell’azienda, traducendosi in una solida collaborazione con il Dipartimento di Ingegneria dell’Ambiente, del Territorio e delle Infrastrutture del Politecnico di Torino. 

Attenta e consapevole dell’importanza della salute e sicurezza dei lavoratori, forma con corsi periodici e specifici il personale (d. Lgs 81/08).

Brillada Vittorio & C.ha acquisito la certificazione di qualità (UNI EN ISO9001:2015), qualifica di lavori pubblici (SOA, Società Organismo di Attestazione) e certificazione CE per la produzione dei conglomerati.

Name: IDS Highway Safety, Inc.
Description:
IDS Highway Safety, Inc. is a Certified WBE/DBE service provider for Highway Safety and Traffic Control in Rhode Island, Massachusetts and Connecticut.

In 2002, Irene Ray and her former partner founded what was then known as ID’s Enterprises, Inc. ID’s began with only a single Truck Mounted Attenuator truck (TMA) and the vision of two women of success in the highway safety industry. A few years later, Irene acquired sole ownership of the company. She changed the company name to IDS Highway Safety Inc. to better reflect the company’s specialty, providing experienced and well-trained employees as both TMA drivers and roadway flag persons to protect construction workers. 

Irene, along with her daughter-in-law, Kristen, and their dedicated team of employees, worked tirelessly to build the company’s reputation in both Rhode Island and Massachusetts. IDS Highway Safety is certified in both states as a WBE (Women Business Enterprise) and DBE (Disadvantaged Business Enterprise) and is newly certified in Connecticut as well.

IDS is a proud member of the Rhode Island Laborers’ Union, the Massachusetts Laborers’ Union and the Teamsters Local 251. IDS is also a member of CIRI, the Construction Industries of Rhode Island.

In 2018, after leaving her mark on the industry, Irene retired. IDS has expanded its services to now provide traffic control safety set-ups, installation and breakdown of temporary traffic control equipment and traffic control products available for purchase to contractors. Kristen continues Irene’s legacy with a fleet of almost three dozen TMA’s and traffic control set-up trucks, various traffic safety products available for purchase or rental and a dedicated staff of approximately 90.

Name: Plate Locks
Description:
Plate Locks, an American manufactured product, are a direct replacement to using cold patch asphalt or flush mounting the plate. They are intended to reduce costs, work zone accidents, injuries and contractor liabilities by consistently marking, identifying and securing road construction plates. Plate Locks safety orange colored road plate ramps are placed around the perimeter of the road plate and mechanically fastened to the roadway with concrete anchors.

This innovative product makes cold patch trench plate securing a thing of the past and reduces your liability while increasing public safety whenever there is a need to use steel road plates in pipeline, gas line, water line construction or any type of utility construction cuts in the road. Never have another sleepless night wondering if your trench plates have shifted, or walked again. No more phone calls from the city, county or police during the wee hours of the morning telling you to come fix a trench plate that has moved and is posing a risk.

Plate Locks road plate ramps can be left in place when steel road plates are removed to allow work to be done in the trench or for inspections. When the work or inspection is done simply replace the steel plate. There is no need to re-install the Plate Locks road plate ramps. Compare that to needing to replace cold patch every time the road plate is moved and you quickly see you have a winning alternative to traditional methods of securing trench plates.

Name: CIRCUROAD
Description:
In het programma CIRCUROAD werken bedrijven, overheden en kennisinstellingen samen aan circulair, biobased asfalt. We vervangen bitumen, het fossiele bindmiddel in asfalt, door hernieuwbare grondstoffen. Het consortium, met Rijkswaterstaat als host, identificeert de beste technologie, zorgt voor een grondige validatie en stimuleert de marktintroductie van duurzaam asfalt. Zo verlagen we de CO2-uitstoot en minimaliseren we de afhankelijkheid van fossiele bronnen.

Vanaf eind 2023 is Rijkswaterstaat de host van het CIRCUROAD-programma. CIRCUROAD past binnen het Transitiepad Wegverharding. Het doel van Rijkswaterstaat is om voor 2030 een klimaatneutrale en circulaire infrastructuur te hebben, waarbij materialen hoogwaardig worden hergebruikt.

Circulair asfalt vraagt enerzijds om hergebruik en anderzijds om een alternatief voor het huidige fossiele bindmiddel, bitumen. De vervanging van bitumen door een biobased en/of circulair bindmiddel vergt innovatieve technologieën waar CIRCUROAD-deelnemers hard aan werken. Zo zijn er proefvakken met verschillende samenstellingen en uit berekeningen blijkt dat een CO2 reductie van 75% mogelijk is. Alleen al in Nederland ligt 136.000 kilometer asfalt, dus het potentieel van deze innovatie is enorm.

The main fields of EKKAF are:
 - The construction of all kinds of post-tensioned projects, pre stressed and post-tensioned beams, deck slabs, buildings, etc.
 -The construction, supply and installation of pre-stressed anchors,
 -The supply of bearings of all types and bearings for seismic insulation,
 -The supply of expansion joints of all types

Name: Accès construction environnement
Description:
QUI SOMMES NOUS?
ACE LTÉE un allié pour votre chantier!

Chaque chantier de construction possède ses particularités et se situe dans des endroits ayant des contraintes différentes. Nos tapis de bois servent à protéger le sol sur lequel ils sont placés afin de réduire les coûts que peut apporter une remise en état des terrains en plus de rendre le chantier plus sécuritaire pour la main-d’œuvre. 

L’installation de tapis à plusieurs avantages ;
-	Facilite le déplacement des équipes et de l’équipement
-	Fais la différence en cas de situation d’urgence 
-	Rends le chantier plus sécuritaire
-	Réduis les risques d’orniérage de la chaussée
-	Préviens la contamination croisée des sols
-	Réduis les coûts de remise en état des terrains
-	Diminue le risque de retard d’échéancier


ACE LTÉE est la référence en matière d’accès temporaire pour vos projets. N’hésitez pas à nous contacter pour de plus amples renseignements sur les services offerts. 

Les tapis de bois!

L’INCONTOURNABLE
DES CHANTIERS

Les tapis de bois, lorsque rattachés les uns aux autres, forment une plate-forme qui peut servir à de nombreux effets; route, site de travail, pad pour grue ou pour conserver du matériel sur une surface propre et solide. Véhicule lourd et machinerie de tout genre peuvent y circuler sans contraintes. Dans une situation d’urgence, ce type d’accès peut faire toute la différence. ACE s'engage à maximiser la sécurité de vos chantiers en réduisant les risques d’incidents et d’accidents qui peuvent causer des délais significatifs et coûteux. Notre souci du détail est ce qui fait d’ACE une entreprise à l’écoute de vos besoins.

Déjà en vigueur dans l’Ouest canadien depuis 1976. Les tapis de bois vous offrent une solution pratique, écologique et moins onéreuse que la construction de routes ou de chemins de pierre.

Name: SR 400 Peach Partners
Description:
SR400 Peach Partners Project consists of the design, construction, finance, operations, and maintenance of a 16-mile-long corridor in the metro Atlanta region, which will be upgraded and expanded to include additional dynamically-tolled free-flow express lanes in each direction between McGinnis Ferry Road in Fulton County and McFarland Parkway in Forsyth County. The Project will also encompass the upgrade of several key bridges along the route, including those at Pitts Road, Roberts Drive, and Kimball Bridge. This is the first project GDOT has entered into with a private sector partner for a long-term DBFOM partnership.

The Project has been designed with the goal of improving accessibility and enhancing travel time reliability for the public, while ensuring safety and minimizing construction impacts to the environment and the local community. SR400 Peach Partners have developed multiple alternative technical concepts to improve design and efficiency, to integrate the expansion of the Metropolitan Atlanta Rapid Transit Authority (MARTA) transit system, and to improve the user experience. Construction has been scheduled to minimize disruption to current traffic patterns. An innovative proprietary solution from team member Indra USA, based on advanced radar technology and traffic predictive modeling, will provide a higher level of safety, reliability, and service during operations. In addition, SR400 Peach Partners will implement an inclusive and comprehensive program to contribute to local economic growth and small business success.

Integrity before Profit was his motto, it is this sentiment that helped establish and shape Pacific Products & Services.

In 2015, the founder of Pacific Products sold to a private family who believes in keeping that vision alive. We introduced more product lines to increase and improve our ability to help every customer find what they are looking for. We have also expanded our territory to provide services to the eight most western United States. And yet, the heart of our company remains selling quality, American made steel from Allied Tube & Conduit, the largest American Steel post manufacturer in the United States

Name: COGEP S.R.L. COSTRUZIONI GENERALI PERFETTI
Description:
Innovazione nel sottosuolo con la T.O.C. – Perforazione Orizzontale Controllata

COGEP Srl si distingue nel settore delle costruzioni per l’utilizzo avanzato della T.O.C. (Trivellazione Orizzontale Controllata), una tecnologia all’avanguardia che consente la posa di cavi e condotte nel sottosuolo senza ricorrere ai tradizionali scavi a cielo aperto. Grazie a questa metodologia, nota anche come Horizontal Directional Drilling (HDD) o “No-dig”, offriamo soluzioni efficienti, rapide e a basso impatto ambientale.

Il nostro processo si articola in tre fasi chiave: perforazione pilota guidata, allargamento del percorso con alesatore e posa finale della condotta o del cavo. Questa tecnologia ci permette di operare in modo preciso e controllato, garantendo risultati di alta qualità e la massima sicurezza per il territorio.

COGEP Srl è il partner ideale per progetti che richiedono innovazione, affidabilità e rispetto per l’ambiente. Scopri come la nostra esperienza e tecnologia possono fare la differenza nel tuo prossimo intervento.

Since its founding in 1989, GEO SEARCH has been the leader in Proactive Disaster Mitigation, commercializing the world’s first high-speed subsurface cavity detection system to find under-pavement anomalies before they develop into sinkholes or other disastrous pavement collapse.  

A survey of the underlying soundness and condition of any roadway is possible down to a depth of 6 feet at ambient traffic speeds up to 60 mph without traffic control.

GEO SEARCH has identified more than 130,000 anomalies (verified as cavities) during GPR surveys of over 180,000 miles of roadway – a distance comparable to circling the earth more than seven times.

Name: DYWIDAG Asia Co., Ltd.
Description:
About DYWIDAG

Founded on over a century of engineering excellence, DYWIDAG is a global leader in providing innovative solutions for the construction and infrastructure industry. From iconic bridges and tunnels to high-rise buildings and dams, our systems help build and maintain some of the world’s most important structures, ensuring they remain safe, durable, and sustainable for generations.

DYWIDAG specializes in post-tensioning, geotechnical, and structural health monitoring technologies. We design and deliver high-performance products such as ground anchors, soil nails, micropiles, stay cables, and advanced monitoring systems that strengthen and protect critical infrastructure against time, traffic, and natural forces.

At DYWIDAG, we combine decades of practical know-how with cutting-edge innovation and global project experience. Our international teams work closely with contractors, engineers, and asset owners to develop tailor-made solutions that meet the highest safety and quality standards, while also ensuring cost efficiency and long-term performance.

With a strong commitment to sustainability and continuous improvement, DYWIDAG plays a key role in extending the lifespan of vital infrastructure and minimizing maintenance costs. Our mission is clear: We protect and reinforce the world’s infrastructure so that people and communities can rely on safe, resilient, and future-ready assets.

Whether it’s supporting new construction or revitalizing aging structures, DYWIDAG stands as a trusted partner for customers worldwide.

Name: Nilsson Construction Ltd
Description:
Nilsson Construction Ltd is a locally owned and operated asphalt paving company that has been servicing the Grande Prairie area since 2006. We strongly believe that quality work and customer care go hand in hand, and so we ensure to make them a top priority. We are respectively inclusive to all our clients, whether you need a small repair, are creating a beautiful laneway, or paving a commercial lot, we treat each project as though it were a personal one.

With experience in the asphalt paving industry, Doug saw an opportunity to take the helm in superior customer service for individual clients and started Nilsson Construction Ltd. Throughout the years we have constructed numerous driveways and parking lots within the Peace Country area. We have worked with Homeowners, Home Builder Associations, and Commercial clients -- including donating to the Rotary Dream Home Lottery by completing the driveways for those projects.

With 20+ years of experience and knowledge constructing roadways for municipalities, Nilsson Construction is not limited to simply asphalt paving. With that background, we have the equipment to construct gravel pads for all your needs, as well as excavation, and can build a solid base for any of your ventures. In the winter we do snow clearing and removal – for both commercial and residential lots, as well as sanding.

 Maintaining the gravel roads in the oilfield is another branch of our business. We have been providing this service on the North Imperial Road south of Grande Prairie for 10+ years. Using a multitude of equipment that includes Graders, Water Trucks, Dozers, Skid Steers, and Back Hoes, we can assist you in keeping your roadways in good repair.

If you have a project in mind, give us a call and we will be happy to help you achieve your vision!

Name: Indian National Group of the IABSE
Description:
Indian National Group (ING) of the International Association for Bridge and Structural Engineering (IABSE) was set up in May 1957, under the patronage of the Government of India, Ministry of Road Transport and Highways with active participation of engineers and professionals from the public and private sector as well as research and academic institutions. It works as an arm of the Parent Body (IABSE), Zurich, Switzerland to promote international co-operation and exchange of technical and scientific knowledge in bridge and structural engineering.

To achieve these aims and objectives, the Group organizes periodical discussions in Seminars, Symposia and Workshops on topical subjects and publishes a quarterly technical Journal “The Bridge and Structural Engineer”.

Name: Grade Stake Pro
Description:
My name is Matthew Schwarz; I’m the founder of Grade Stake Solutions and the inventor of the Grade Stake Pro, which removes the risk of human error from manually checking grades off of grade stakes.  
 
I’m also a foreman for a heavy equipment company specializing in road construction and reconstruction. 
 
A critical part of our work is establishing precision cuts, fills, and all possible elevations from the bottom of the 12-inch prep to the Top of the Curb or final grade. Errors in the grading process can add up to tens of thousands of dollars vanishing from your bottom line. 
 
Even with the best GPS technology, I’ve found significant depth variances in work that, if not caught, could cause substantial material waste and rework. 
 
The only way to catch these problems before they cost you money is through regular, manual checking of grades off grade stakes. 

Historically, the accuracy of manual checking for grades off of grade stakes is at risk from human error, such as using incorrect math, conversions, or using the wrong project data for variables like rock or concrete depth. 

My Grade Stake Pro application has proven to remove human error from the process while enabling workers to complete the task faster.  This app allows you to centrally control the known variables for each job and endless sub-areas within a job site with different values.  
 
The Grade Stake Pro application is simple to set up, learn, and put to use:  

1) Create a job and define the concrete, curb, and rock depths

2) On-site workers access the app on a mobile device and enter the grade stake info, cut/fill, and value. 

3) The application then returns the results for all possible elevations from the bottom of the 12-inch prep to the Top of the Curb/final grade.

Name: UPTODATE INFRASTRUCTURE PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
UPTODATE Infrastructure Private Limited is pioneering a new chapter in India’s construction industry as an AI-Driven Aggregator for building material supply. Focused on grit, aggregates, and essential construction inputs, our mission is to bring transparency, efficiency, and reliability to one of the most unorganized yet critical supply chains in the country.

The Problem We Solve

Construction projects across India often face delays and cost overruns due to:

Unverified vendors and inconsistent pricing

Pilferage and wastage during transport

Inefficient truck routing and delivery delays

Lack of real-time visibility for contractors and EPCs

Manual invoicing and reconciliation errors

Our AI-Driven Approach

We transform this fragmented system into a seamless digital ecosystem:

Smart Vendor Sourcing: Verified quarries, crushers, and suppliers with compliance checks.

Logistics Intelligence: GPS tracking, optimized routes, and e-POD (electronic proof of delivery).

Real-Time Tracking: Material flow monitored from quarry → transit → site.

Fraud & Pilferage Control: AI-driven reconciliation of weighbridge data with delivery slips.

Demand Forecasting: Predictive analytics to align supply with project schedules.

FinOps Integration: GST e-invoicing, escrow payments, and automated reconciliation.

Impact We Deliver

 25% faster deliveries with optimized fleet operations

 20% cost savings by reducing pilferage and inefficiency

 100% transparency for contractors and investors via dashboards

 Sustainability focus through route optimization and lower fuel wastage

Our Mission

To make construction supply chains in India organized, reliable, and tech-first, giving developers, contractors, and infrastructure companies the confidence to scale projects without bottlenecks.

UPTODATE Infrastructure is more than a supplier—it is a trusted partner in building India’s future.

Name: greenlaser

Wer Rost oder Oxidierungen entfernen möchte, muss darauf achten, wirklich jedes kleine Teil davon zu erwischen. 
Das kann von Hand schon mühsam sein. Mit Laserlicht wird es um ein Vielfaches einfacher: da die Rostschicht durch das Laserlicht Stück für Stück abgebrannt wird, ist das Metall darunter im Handumdrehen rostfrei und kann direkt wieder genutzt, versiegelt oder nachbehandelt werden, auch ideal für stark gebrauchte Teile wie Abgaskrümmer. 
Wir entrosten für Sie: Bei uns. Bei Ihnen.

Bye Rost.

Name: Tremix Flooring
Description:
Tremix Flooring is a specialized concrete flooring method designed for industrial and commercial spaces requiring high strength, durability, and a dust-free finish. Also known as Vacuum Dewatered Flooring (VDF), Tremix utilizes vacuum pumps to remove excess water from freshly laid concrete, resulting in a denser and more compact surface. 

This process increases the compressive strength of the floor and ensures a longer lifespan, making it ideal for factories, warehouses, parking lots, roads, and heavy-duty work zones. Tremix floors are renowned for their resistance to wear and tear, low maintenance requirements, and ability to withstand heavy machinery and high traffic volumes. 

We offer professional Tremix, IPS, and Concrete Flooring services across Telangana and Andhra Pradesh, using advanced techniques and experienced teams. Choose Tremix Flooring for a cost-effective and performance-driven flooring solution. Contact us today for a free site visit and estimate.

Name: SABA CIVIL MANAGEMENT & CONSULTANCY
Description:
Established in 2019, SABA Civil Management & Consultancy has swiftly become a notable force in the civil and building construction sector. Our portfolio boasts the successful completion of major and minor projects, from Bridges and Roads to Pavements, Tunnels, Local Government Projects, and Flood Recovery Projects. In a short time, we've garnered trust, solidifying our reputation as a respected name. 

Our ascent is propelled by a highly skilled team of civil engineering professionals—adept project managers, a proficient geotechnical team, and an innovative design team. Their commitment to excellence, reflected in advanced-level skills across civil engineering, forms the foundation of our success. 

Empowered by the versatility and expertise of our team, we seamlessly navigate major infrastructure projects and intricate developments. Our proactive and efficient approach ensures not just meeting but exceeding expectations, forming the cornerstone of our success. 

SABA Civil Management & Consultancy transcends being a construction entity; it's a testament to innovation, reliability, and an unwavering commitment to top-notch results. Operating across NSW, Sydney, and Western Australia, our influence extends beyond structures, contributing to the future of civil construction. 

Innovation is ingrained in our operations, adopting cutting-edge technologies that position us as leaders steering civil construction into uncharted territories. Reliability is the cornerstone of our client relationships, promising peace of mind in every project. Our commitment extends beyond completion dates to positively impact communities and the environment, reflected in our comprehensive sustainability approach. 

In essence, SABA Civil Management & Consultancy is more than a civil consultancy company; it's a partner in progress. Our journey is defined by dedication to excellence, innovation, and delivering unparalleled results in the ever-evolving realm of civil construction.

Name: Boden BV
Description:
Bij Boden BV combineren we meer dan 40 jaar ervaring in grond-, wegen-, en waterbouwwerken met een sterke toewijding aan duurzaamheid en innovatie. Als een toonaangevende speler in de bouwsector, bieden wij een volledig spectrum aan diensten voor zowel overheidsinstellingen, industriële klanten als particulieren. Onze projecten variëren van stedelijke infrastructuurontwikkeling tot specifieke milieuvriendelijke oplossingen, zoals de constructie van waterbeheersystemen.

Onze moderne betoncentrale staat centraal in onze bedrijfsvoering. Hier gebruiken we geavanceerde technologieën om gerecycleerde materialen om te zetten in hoogwaardig beton, wat niet alleen kosten bespaart maar ook helpt bij het verminderen van bouwafval en de milieu-impact van nieuwe projecten.

Waterbouwwerken zijn een ander specialisme van Boden. Wij zorgen voor het ontwerp, de aanleg, en het onderhoud van waterwerken die essentieel zijn voor zowel waterbeheer als bescherming tegen watergerelateerde risico's. Onze expertise in het onderhoud van grachten, waterlopen, en bermen helpt om de ecologische integriteit en de veiligheid van de omgeving te waarborgen.

Daarnaast bieden wij een uitgebreide containerdienst aan voor het beheer van bouw- en sloopafval. Onze logistieke oplossingen en gescheiden afvalverwerking garanderen een efficiënte afvoer en recycling van materialen, in lijn met de hoogste milieu- en veiligheidsnormen.

Het team van Boden is samengesteld uit professionals die continu op de hoogte blijven van de nieuwste technieken en innovaties in onze sector. Wij zijn gepassioneerd over het leveren van oplossingen die niet alleen voldoen aan de eisen van onze klanten, maar deze ook overtreffen.

Wilt u meer weten over onze diensten of heeft u een project waarbij onze expertise van pas kan komen? Neem contact met ons op via LinkedIn of bezoek onze website. 
Wij bespreken graag de mogelijkheden om een succesvol en duurzaam project te realiseren samen met u.

Name: SOTEG S.A.R.L.
Description:
SOTEG (Société Trans-Arabe d’Entreprise et de Gestion) is a regional marine and civil infrastructure contractor with a permanent presence in Lebanon and Africa, delivering complex port and coastal engineering works since 1988.

We specialize in dredging and land reclamation, quay rehabilitation, marine foundations, deep piling systems, and coastal infrastructure supporting public authorities, EPC contractors, and port operators.

SOTEG holds top-tier Lebanese classifications (Category One for public works and buildings, First Level for roads and maritime works) and has executed major marine infrastructure across Lebanon, Nigeria, Angola, and Congo. Our expertise combines local engineering capability with international execution standards, enabling us to operate reliably in challenging maritime environments.

As part of our long-term growth strategy, SOTEG is expanding into BOT/PPP maritime concessions, including slipways, dry-docks, and port rehabilitation packages, positioning the company as a long-term asset developer alongside its contracting capability.

Core Expertise
• Marine foundations & piling (combi-walls, tubular piles, sheet piles)
• Dredging & land reclamation
• Port rehabilitation & quay structures
• Coastal protection & marine civil works
• BOT/PPP marine concessions (strategic expansion)

Name: RKR Ręczne Kierowanie Ruchem - Cała Polska
Description:
Dysponujemy wieloma profesjonalnymi zespołami do kierowania ruchem. Każda brygada ma duże doświadczenie i jest przygotowana na prace w każdych warunkach. 

Możliwość pracy 7 dni w tygodniu oraz w systemie zmianowym. Pracujemy 24 godziny na dobę. W szczególnych przypadkach możemy również wykonywać na drodze niewielkie prace przygotowawcze i zakończeniowe przed i po zakończeniu pracy np. obrócenie oznakowania, włączenie i wyłączenie sygnalizacji oraz jej przeprogramowanie.

Mamy doświadczenie w pracy pod presją zarówno na drogach krajowych, jak i na drogach wojewódzkich. Współpracujemy z dużymi wykonawcami oraz obsługujemy mniejsze podmioty przy pracach na mniejszych inwestycjach.

Cechuje nas bardzo dobra organizacja pracy całego zespołu przez co możemy kierować ruchem nawet w trudnych warunkach takich jak ograniczona widoczność czy duże natężenie ruchu.
